title: alchemilla reniformis subsp. ursina
intro: Alchemilla reniformis subsp. ursina, commonly known as the Ursa Lady's Mantle or Bear's Head Lady's Mantel, is a subspecies of the Alchemilla reniformis plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, reducing swelling, and preventing infection. The health benefits of Alchemilla reniformis subsp. ursina include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions, or internally to support urinary health and reduce inflammation.
